parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -created_at). Allowed: id, purchase_order_number, purchase_order_date, estimated_delivery_date, order_status, submission_status, receipt_status, shipment_status, invoice_status, total, total_quantity, supplier_id, created_at, updated_at

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across PO number, supplier name, item SKU, invoice number, tracking number

parameters.name: filter[order_status]
parameters.description: Filter by order status: draft, open, closed

parameters.name: table_specifications
parameters.description: Return table column specifications instead of data
